docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAN, KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FANNIN, ALADDIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 407 WILDE AVE., (LOWER UNIT, SECOND BEDROOM ON LEFT), CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAN, KEVIN SERVED DEC-15-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FANNIN, ALADDIN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $19.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAN, KEVIN
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF TRAN, KEVIN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT FANNIN, ALADDIN
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAN, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT FANNIN, ALADDIN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAN, KEVIN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT FANNIN, ALADDIN
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAN, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT FANNIN, ALADDIN
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FANNIN, ALADDIN
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON DEC-30-2024.
